evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET MAUI MatrixScan AR app from Scandit SDK v7 to v8. Here are my current files: MainPageViewModelV7.cs and MauiProgramV7.cs. What do I need to change?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that for MAUI specifically, v7 → v8 does NOT require adding manual `ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize()` / `ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize()` calls — the MAUI builder extensions (`UseScanditCore` / `UseScanditBarcode`) already perform the initialization. The BarcodeAr constructor, the `<scandit:BarcodeArView>` XAML control, the listener / SessionUpdated event, the BarcodeArSession shape, the provider interfaces, and the highlight / annotation constructors are all unchanged in v8. The skill instructs the user to bump all four Scandit `<PackageReference>` versions (Core, Core.Maui, Barcode, Barcode.Maui) to the latest stable v8 release, confirms that the existing `.UseScanditCore().UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddBarcodeArView())` chain is what's needed, and provides the v7→v8 migration guide URLs.

assertions.text: The skill instructs the user to bump all four Scandit PackageReference versions: Scandit.DataCapture.Core, Scandit.DataCapture.Core.Maui, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode, Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode.Maui

The skill explicitly states (or strongly implies) that no manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() / ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() call should be added to MainApplication.cs or AppDelegate.cs in MAUI (because the builder extensions handle initialization)
The skill confirms the MauiProgram.cs builder chain `.UseScanditCore().UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddBarcodeArView())` is the correct shape (and does NOT need to be changed for v7 → v8)

The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace `new BarcodeAr(dataCaptureContext, settings)` with a factory call — the .NET BarcodeAr constructor is unchanged in v7→v8 and no `BarcodeAr.Create(...)` / `BarcodeAr.ForDataCaptureContext(...)` exists

The skill does NOT instruct the user to change the `<scandit:BarcodeArView>` XAML control or its bindable properties (DataCaptureContext, BarcodeAr, BarcodeArViewSettings) — they are unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to add OnObservationStarted / OnObservationStopped methods to IBarcodeArListener (the .NET interface only has OnSessionUpdated)

The skill does NOT instruct the user to pass a Context / UIViewController argument to BarcodeArRectangleHighlight / BarcodeArCircleHighlight / BarcodeArInfoAnnotation constructors — they still take only a Barcode
The skill does NOT introduce a SetBarcodeFilter(...) call or an IBarcodeArFilter interface in the migrated code — this API is not available in the .NET MAUI binding
The skill does NOT instruct the user to use ShouldShowMacroModeControl on the MAUI BarcodeArView — that property is not exposed on the cross-platform MAUI control
At least one migration guide URL is provided (Android https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-7-to-8/ or iOS https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-7-to-8/)

evals.prompt: I'm bumping the Scandit .NET MAUI MatrixScan AR SDK from v7 to v8. What source-code changes do I need to make?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that in MAUI the v7 → v8 source change is essentially nothing beyond bumping the four NuGet packages: the MAUI builder extensions (`UseScanditCore` / `UseScanditBarcode`) already handle SDK initialization, so unlike the non-MAUI .NET Android / .NET iOS skills, there is NO manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() / ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() call to add. The BarcodeAr constructor, `<scandit:BarcodeArView>` XAML control, IBarcodeArListener single-method interface, SessionUpdated event, provider async interfaces, and highlight / annotation constructors are all unchanged. Provides the v7→v8 migration guide URLs.

assertions.text: The skill states that the v7 → v8 step on MAUI requires bumping all four Scandit packages (Core, Core.Maui, Barcode, Barcode.Maui) to the same v8 version

The skill explicitly states (or strongly implies) that in MAUI, no manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() / ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() call needs to be added to MainApplication.cs or AppDelegate.cs (because UseScanditCore / UseScanditBarcode call them)
The skill states that the BarcodeAr constructor (new BarcodeAr(context, settings)) is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill states that the `<scandit:BarcodeArView>` XAML control and its bindable properties are unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to rename `new BarcodeAr(...)` to a `Create(...)` or `ForDataCaptureContext(...)` factory call
At least one migration guide URL is provided (Android https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-7-to-8/ or iOS https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/ios/migrate-7-to-8/)
